positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a glowing constellation map. The main subject is a stylized, ethereal arrangement of geometric stars and flowing cosmic nebulae rendered in deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, and metallic gold. The style is Art Deco celestial cartography mixed with modern abstract pop art, using clean, bold linework and high contrast. The composition must be central and symmetrical, suitable for an apparel print repeat. Incorporate subtle, interlocking geometric patterns that resemble astronomical constellations and celestial machinery. Use a limited color palette (indigo, turquoise, gold, black background) to ensure crisp print quality. Highly detailed, high contrast, vector art feel, symmetrical composition, silhouette style.
negative: blurry, low detail, messy, text, watermark, signature, noise, artifacts, low contrast, dirty, gradient, logo, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photography, photorealism
